name: bee
description: Smart AI assistant for analyzing data and creating charts in seconds. Just upload your files (CSV, JSON) or connect a database, and get clear insights, visualizations, and reports. Perfect for startups, analysts, and researchers. Pay per query or choose a monthly plan.
